subcodes.first_line: My remembrance and My praise, My call and My rising up, My sitting down and My sleep and My waking, all belong to God, the Lord of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری و ثنائی و ندائی و قیامی و قعودی و نومی و یقظی لله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
